response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience as a full-stack developer with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the primary stack required for the role. They also have experience with AI agent development and various other technologies relevant to the position.
strengths: Proficient in TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Experience with AI agent development and various other relevant technologies
concerns: Lack of direct experience with Nest.js
Limited experience with Kotlin/Java compared to other technologies
No direct mention of experience with Vitest, though they have experience with other testing frameworks
